trigger_instruction: A reviewer left a comment on your pull request. Critically evaluate the feedback before acting on it. Do NOT blindly follow the reviewer's suggestion. Think about whether the suggestion is correct, whether it would break existing functionality, and whether it aligns with the PR's intent. If the suggestion is valid, implement it. If it is wrong or harmful, explain why in your reply and do not apply it. Do NOT use flattery or praise like "Good catch!", "Great point!", "You're right!" in your reply. Just state what you changed (or didn't change) and why. Be direct and professional.
